name: studiomeyer-geo-hooks
description: Auto-audit AI visibility after every Markdown content edit. One mcp_tool hook for the StudioMeyer GEO MCP. Requires Claude Code v2.1.118 or later. Replace url + brand input fields before installing — they are placeholders.

placeholders.url: Replace https://example.com with the URL you want to audit (your homepage, /blog, /docs, etc.). Must be public — geo_check sends the URL to 8 LLM providers.
placeholders.brand: Replace 'Your Brand' with the brand name LLMs should associate with the URL.

compliance.gdpr: geo_check sends the URL + brand name to 8 LLM provider APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Perplexity, xAI, DeepSeek, Meta, Microsoft). Use only public URLs. The Stop hook with if-filter on *.md|*.mdx ensures the check only runs after a markdown edit, not after pure code changes.
compliance.notes: Default mode is 'training' (uses LLM training-data recall, free). To use native web-search swap to mode='search' — costs $0.30-0.50 per run depending on provider. The 1-hour cache window means re-running within an hour returns identical scores (no extra spend).
